title: Claude Code Hook Request
description: Request payload sent by Claude Code to ORAC hook endpoints. Covers all 6 ORAC hook events.

session_id.description: Unique identifier for the Claude Code session.

event.description: The hook event type. ORAC handles all 6.

hook_id.description: Unique identifier for this hook invocation.

tool_name.description: Name of the tool being invoked (PreToolUse/PostToolUse only).

tool_input.description: Input parameters for the tool (PreToolUse/PostToolUse only).

target.description: Target of the action (file path, URL, etc.).

stop_reason.description: Why the session is stopping (Stop only).
